title: Sanji’s Childhood Wound
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Judge, Unknown person #9, Reiju, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Sanji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji’s past explains why his family name is a wound rather than a source of pride.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I speak for all of us when I say... Welcome home, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Welcome back to your "Vinsmoke family".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be more than happy to remind you of the hierarchy in this house, anytime you want!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you... are the dud... the mishap... the failure, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Listen carefully. You all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are my greatest creations of all time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The result of the most advanced, progressive scientific breakthroughs and genetic engineering that the world has ever known...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your skills and abilities will not be bound by human limitations or boundaries!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When the time comes, nothing in this world will deter you five from your ultimate goal...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: each of you will stand at the head of and lead an army...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Consisting of only germa 66, which shall continue to grow and evolve thanks to the power of science! The blood that coarse through your veins has been blessed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With limitless potential! For that potential to be realized, all that's left for you to do ...is train!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Yes, Father!!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Sanji is clearly inferior to the rest...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His scores continue to fall further and further behind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The results have come in!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Ichiji, Lord Niji, and Lord Yonji are all right on track.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: their "Outer skeletons" have already started to form, and their bodies...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: have matured into the level of an adult men both in terms of strength and agility.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, it appears that Lord Sanji is... Well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As much as it pains me to say these words...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no other way to describe his data other than to call him a total "failure".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On paper, all four of their genes were in fact successfully modified...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But for some inexplicable reason, he is the only one whose attributes and measures have remained almost constant from the moment of his birth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What are you getting at?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Lord Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: is simply a normal, regular human being.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Sniff Sniff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Feel free to dig in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I made that just for you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: SQUEAK SQUEAK!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 31 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
